steps.title: Do not solve for $x$
steps.content: The target expression, $x^2-7x$, is already hidden inside the equation $$4x^2-28x-36=0.$$ Factor $4$ from the first two terms by dividing the whole equation by $4$.

steps.title: Isolate the target expression
steps.content: Dividing by $4$ gives $$x^2-7x-9=0.$$ Add $9$ to both sides: $$x^2-7x=9.$$
